metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.hired.total
metrics.description: Fired on PlatformUserHired. Feeds the ops onboarding dashboard + monthly headcount reports.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.suspended.total
metrics.description: Fired on PlatformUserSuspended. A rising rate is a signal for security review.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.restored.total
metrics.description: Fired on PlatformUserRestored. Feeds the same dashboard as suspensions — the delta is 'active suspensions in flight'.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.offboarded.total
metrics.description: Fired on PlatformUserOffboarded. `trigger` label distinguishes voluntary_resignation, involuntary_termination, contract_expiry, restructuring. Feeds headcount + attrition dashboards.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.offboarding.access_revoked.duration_seconds
metrics.description: Time from PlatformUserOffboarded emission to RevokePlatformUserAccessJob completion. SLA is 24h (86400s). P99 must be < 86400 — alerting fires at 12h (43200s) on the p95.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.offboarding.sla_breach.total
metrics.description: Number of RevokePlatformUserAccessJob runs that did NOT complete within `platform-user.offboarding.sla_hours`. Any non-zero value pages PagerDuty.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.retention.purged.total
metrics.description: PlatformUser rows hard-deleted by PurgeOffboardedPlatformUsersJob after the retention hold.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.retention.blocked.total
metrics.description: PurgeOffboardedPlatformUsersJob refused to hard-delete a row. `reason` label: `revocation_incomplete`, `audit_correlation_pending`, `retention_extended_by_compliance`.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.active.count
metrics.description: Active PlatformUser headcount per department. Sampled hourly by a scheduled command.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.mfa.coverage_ratio
metrics.description: Ratio of active PlatformUsers whose Identity has mfa_secret_encrypted NOT NULL. Target: 1.0 (every platform staffer has MFA). Anything less than 1.0 is a compliance drift.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.on_call.resolver.duration_ms
metrics.description: OnCallResolver latency. `backend` label: `internal` | `pagerduty`. P99 target < 200ms so escalation routing does not slow the incident-response critical path.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.on_call.resolver.miss.total
metrics.description: OnCallResolver returned null (no shift resolved). `reason` label: `no_current_shift`, `backend_timeout`, `backend_error`, `disabled`. Non-zero misses during business hours warrant an ops review.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.audit_row.written.total
metrics.description: Every audit row the `platform.audit` middleware writes. Feeds the SOC 2 CC7.2 volume dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.pii_access.total
metrics.description: Every time `viewPii` OR `viewHrContext` OR `viewOnCallPhone` was invoked. `ability` label maps to the specific permission. Fed to the DPO for periodic review.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.manager_reassignments.total
metrics.description: PlatformUserManagerReassigned occurrences. Spikes correlate with re-org events.

metrics.name: academorix.platform_user.department_changes.total
metrics.description: PlatformUserDepartmentChanged occurrences. Feeds the internal transfer dashboard.
